name: Fish Fantastic and Fast
recipeIngredient: 4 Fish fillets or steaks; about 6 ounces each, 3/4 inch thick
2 tablespoons Chopped fresh thyme or 2 teaspoons Dried thyme
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Cut four 12-inch circles from kitchen parchment paper; fold each circle in half.
Unfold the circles and place fish pieces next to the folds. Top each piece of fish with tomato bits, lemon juice, thyme, garlic, salt, and pepper, dividing equally.
Refold the parchment over the fish so that the cut edges meet. Fold and roll the cut edges up all the way around to seal the packets securely.
Place the packets on a baking sheet; bake for 10 to 12 minutes until they are browned and puffed. Transfer to plates and cut open to serve. Any thick-fleshed fish such as halibut, sea bass, and orange roughy. Aluminum foil may be used in place of kitchen parchment paper. Cut four 12-inch squares of foil; proceed as with the parchment circles, but bake for 12 minutes.
